title: UnderWorld SMP Modpack
description: A heavily modded Minecraft experience focused on underground exploration, survival, and community. Dig deep, build creatively, and thrive in a world where the real adventure starts below the surface.
body:
🔹 UnderWorld SMP Modpack – Survive, build, and thrive beneath the surface.


Dive into a modded Minecraft experience where the world begins underground and civilization rises from the caves.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/_u01NzHk8IM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This pack is designed for the UnderWorld SMP server and emphasizes:

🌍 Deep World Generation – Explore massive cave systems, underground rivers, and forgotten bunkers

⚔️ Enhanced Combat – Thanks to Better Combat and smooth animations

🎙️ Built-in Proximity Voice Chat with group support

🏗️ Create Mod Tech, vertical base-building, and immersive decor

📜 Lore & Story Support – Mods like Amendments, Athena, and Server Replay for storytelling

🔧 QoL Mods – JEI, mod menus, dynamic lighting, and performance boosts

🌐 Multiplayer-Optimized – Built for smooth performance on SMP with AntiXray, Replay, VoiceChat, and more

Whether you’re into story-driven roleplay, technical builds, or epic underground exploration, this pack is made to fuel your creativity below the surface.
